name: INNOVATIVE SOLUTIONS & SUPPORT INC
summary: Innovative Solutions and Support, Inc. (ISSC) develops and manufactures avionics products including flight panel display systems, air data systems, ThrustSense Autothrottle, NextGen Flight Deck, COCKPIT/IP, and VMC-a Mitigation systems. The company serves both commercial and government aviation markets, providing cockpit modernization and upgrade solutions. ISSC holds domestic and international certifications for its products and targets general aviation, commercial, and military aircraft operators.
